description: A high-power rocket is scheduled to launch under a strict 1,200m FAA altitude waiver. Using the 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork' design, modify the configuration to use a 3.0m launch rail and select a motor for the 54mm mount that achieves a launch rod clearance velocity of at least 15.0 m/s and an apogee of no more than 1,200m. Save the optimized design to '~/Documents/rockets/optimized_rail_clearance.ork'. Write a compliance report to '~/Documents/exports/clearance_report.txt' including the selected motor, the 3.0m launch rod length, the simulated clearance velocity (m/s), and the simulated apogee (m).
